Description
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session
 

  • Uses of SessionException in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session

    Methods in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session that throw SessionException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    ZenohSession.declareInterest(Interest.Mode mode, int options, String keyExpr, ZenohSession.DiscoveryListener listener)
    Send an INTEREST message asking the router to notify us of DECLARE records matching the given key expression.
    Subscription
    ZenohSession.declareSubscriber(KeyExpr keyExpr)
    Declare a subscription against the router for the given key expression (may contain wildcards; see KeyExpr).
    Subscription
    ZenohSession.declareSubscriber(String keyExpr)
    Sugar for ZenohSession.declareSubscriber(KeyExpr) taking a string.
    void
    ZenohSession.finalInterest(long interestId)
    Terminate a running Future / CurrentFuture interest.
    void
    ZenohSession.open()
    Perform the four-message handshake and enter SessionState.OPEN.
    void
    ZenohSession.publish(String keyExpr, byte[] payload)
    Publish a payload under a key expression.
    void
    ZenohSession.publish(String keyExpr, byte[] payload, Encoding encoding)
    Publish with an explicit encoding.
    void
    ZenohSession.publishJson(String keyExpr, String json)
    Publish a JSON string with the application/json encoding tag.
    void
    ZenohSession.publishString(String keyExpr, String payload)
    Publish a UTF-8 string with the standard string-encoding tag.
